title: SessionPatch
description: Metadata about a unified-diff patch produced by a Jules session. The patch body itself is NOT stored on the node (token-expensive); the bytes are addressable via the jules_patch tool when needed.

session_id.description: Session that produced the patch. Forms a 1:1 edge `DERIVED_FROM` -> JulesSession.

patch_bytes.description: Total size of the unified diff in bytes.

base_commit.description: Commit SHA the patch was produced against, when available.

suggested_commit_message.description: Commit message that jules_patch_summary recommends for the change.

extracted_at.description: Unix epoch when the recover phase pulled the patch metadata.

applied.description: True once integrate (or recover) successfully runs `git apply`. Null when only the summary was fetched.
